headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -85.7)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 207% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 145 quotes, including 109 at strong intensity - people are expressing intense anger and irritation today.

• Despite the high volume, frustration scores dropped significantly from yesterday's peak but remain well above the typical range.

• Both fears and optimism stay deeply negative, with optimism hitting particularly low levels compared to its historical range.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
